description:
Recto: Short note about a court settlement from Fustat. An uncle allows his nephew to pay him back a sum of 10 dinars in 20 installments, the latter giving as security a 1.5-share in a house belonging to him (out of 24) in case he fails to pay for two consecutive months. 1134 CE. (Written by Nathan Hakohen b. Shlomo. AA)
Verso: Judaeo-Arabic discussion of Genesis 20 with Hebrew citations. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:594; Goitein's index cards; and CUDL) EMS
description_he: פתק קצר, פוסטאט: דוד מאפשר לאחיינו לפרוע 10 דינר ב-20 תשלומים, בביטחון של 1.5 חלקים מבית. 1134. על הגב: דיון ביהודית-ערבית על בראשית כ עם ציטוטים עבריים.
